summary: RM Performance Analytics Feature - Full Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components working correctly. Both new endpoints (GET /api/admin/rm-analytics and GET /api/admin/sla-breaches) are functioning with proper role-based access control.

issues: Minor console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - This is caused by React.Fragment rendering with span wrappers from the visual editor. Does not affect functionality but can cause hydration warnings in production.

critical_code_review_comments: RM Analytics Service (/app/backend/services/rm_analytics_service.py): Well-structured with proper date handling, conversion calculations, and aggregations
Admin Routes (/app/backend/routes/admin.py): Both endpoints properly protected with require_role('admin') dependency
Frontend Page (/app/frontend/src/pages/admin/RMPerformanceAnalytics.js): Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes, responsive design, and Recharts integration
Sidebar Navigation: 'RM Analytics' link properly added to DashboardLayout.js for admin users
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing RM and lead data
context_for_next_testing_agent: RM Performance Analytics feature fully implemented and tested. Backend has 2 new endpoints: (1) GET /api/admin/rm-analytics?time_period={week|month|quarter|year|all} returns comprehensive RM metrics including funnel, conversion rates, financials, time metrics. (2) GET /api/admin/sla-breaches returns aging leads and SLA breach alerts. Frontend at /admin/rm-analytics has three tabs: RM Leaderboard (expandable rows), GMV & Conversion charts (Recharts), SLA Alerts (with config info). All data is computed from existing leads collection. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_rm_analytics.py

rm_analytics.response_validation: Complete - funnel, conversion_rates, financials, time_metrics for each RM
rm_analytics.data_integrity: Verified totals match sum of individual RM values

leaderboard_features: Row expansion with Stage Funnel, Conversion Rates, Financials & Time
charts: Overall Conversion Rate by RM (bar chart)
navigation: RM Analytics link in sidebar for admin users
